HomePage.title: Agent Workflow Hub
HomePage.hero_subtitle: Stop feeding AI your entire codebase. Eliminate context bloat, cure AI amnesia, and enforce pixel-perfect UI consistency with a memory-persistent architecture built for enterprise scale.
HomePage.feature_1_desc: Don't waste thousands of tokens on irrelevant files. Our proprietary STATE.md architecture creates a hyper-focused, lightweight RAM that keeps your AI lightning fast and relentlessly accurate.
HomePage.feature_1_prob: Traditional chats collapse under massive context windows.
HomePage.feature_1_sol: A strict 20-line state file guarantees maximum performance.
HomePage.feature_2_desc: Never explain your project rules again. Our seamless One-Click Handoff engine perfectly encapsulates architectural decisions, bug histories, and ongoing tasks across unlimited chat sessions.
HomePage.feature_2_prob: Starting a new session resets your AI's brain completely.
HomePage.feature_2_sol: State preservation ensures zero loss of critical context.
HomePage.feature_3_desc: Lock down your Design System. The protocol forces the AI to strictly ingest and adhere to your UI guidelines before it is allowed to touch a single line of frontend code.
HomePage.feature_3_prob: Autonomous agents hallucinate colors and destroy layouts.
HomePage.feature_3_sol: Design tokens enforce absolute visual conformity.
HomePage.feature_4_desc: Execute autonomous code with absolute confidence. Our framework features recursive Git Hooks and OS-level write locks to prevent catastrophic file corruption and API key leaks.
HomePage.feature_4_prob: Raw AI agents accidentally expose secrets or overwrite critical files.
HomePage.feature_4_sol: Multi-layered safety protocols guard your repository 24/7.
HomePage.portfolio_subtitle: Discover the enterprise-grade tools, workflows, and frameworks engineered to accelerate autonomous development.
HomePage.project_1_desc: The flagship memory-persistent framework to eliminate context amnesia for AI agents.
HomePage.project_2_desc: A radically modern content management infrastructure built natively on Next.js.
HomePage.project_3_desc: The definitive hub for discovering and installing Model Context Protocol servers.
HomePage.problem_section_subtitle: As projects scale, developers often encounter architectural bottlenecks in how data is fed to AI. This protocol solves three main issues:
HomePage.problem_1_desc: The longer you chat, the more old code and logs fill up the AI's memory. This causes the AI to hallucinate, forget important variables, and waste API tokens.
HomePage.problem_2_desc: When the chat gets too slow, you have to start a new one. But then the AI forgets your project structure, database schema, and the bugs you just fixed 5 minutes ago.
HomePage.problem_3_desc: If you let the AI design web pages freely, it will invent random CSS classes and use incorrect brand colors, resulting in a messy and inconsistent UI.

ManualPage.title: User Manual
ManualPage.subtitle: This guide explains how to use the protocol to systematically manage your workflow with AI Coding Agents.
ManualPage.sec_1_desc: Getting started is very easy. This step creates the 'memory brain' for the AI in your project.
ManualPage.sec_1_step_1: Open Terminal and navigate to your project folder: cd ~/my-app
ManualPage.sec_1_step_3_a: The system creates a hidden .ai/ folder, which acts as the AI's notebook.
ManualPage.sec_1_step_3_b: A STATE.md file is created so the AI can record its current tasks and not forget old ones.
ManualPage.sec_1_step_3_c: The system instructs your IDE to operate more systematically.
ManualPage.sec_1_note: Optional: Install Git Hook to prevent uploading .env files:
ManualPage.sec_2_desc: Define clear UI guidelines so the AI writes consistent design code every time. Copy a template from .ai/templates/ui/ to .ai/docs/ui_guidelines.md:
ManualPage.sec_2_note: From now on, the AI will read ui_guidelines.md as a reference for writing UI code.
ManualPage.sec_3_desc: To save Tokens and ensure the AI works accurately, divide tasks into small pieces.
ManualPage.sec_3_step_1: Start Work: Open a new chat. Copy the message in .ai/prompts/01-session-start.md and paste it as the first prompt.
ManualPage.sec_3_step_2: Micro-Tasks: Ask the AI to edit files a little at a time (2-3 files). Do not ask it to build huge features at once.
ManualPage.sec_3_step_3: Test: Test the code frequently. If you find a bug, ask the AI to fix it immediately.
ManualPage.sec_3_step_4: End Task: When the micro-feature is done, copy the message in .ai/prompts/02-session-end.md to let the AI save progress to .ai/STATE.md.
ManualPage.sec_4_desc: Manage the files in the .ai/ folder so they don't get too bloated.
ManualPage.sec_4_desc_1: Records the current task. If you want to start a completely new task, backup the old file and clear it with:
ManualPage.sec_4_desc_2: Records learned lessons from fixed bugs. If it exceeds 15 items, archive old lessons with:
ManualPage.sec_4_desc_3: Records architectural decisions (e.g., choosing a specific tool or Database).
ManualPage.sec_5_desc: When the chat gets too long and the AI slows down, you should move to a new chat using the Handoff tool to transfer the context.
ManualPage.sec_5_step_2: Copy the text generated by the system.
ManualPage.sec_5_step_3: Open a brand new chat in your IDE.
ManualPage.sec_5_step_4: Paste the copied text into the new chat to resume work seamlessly.
ManualPage.sec_6_desc: View a summary of your project's status via Terminal.
ManualPage.sec_6_note: The system will display pending tasks, recent reflections, and architectural decisions.
ManualPage.sec_7_desc: When you force the AI to read long code or docs, it consumes massive Tokens and causes Context Bloat. We use Google NotebookLM to read them instead.
ManualPage.sec_7_step_2_note: 💡 Tip: This script is smart! If you have Chrome open and are logged into Google, the script will steal the session cookie to login automatically in a split second.
ManualPage.sec_7_step_3_b: Create a new Notebook (e.g., named AI Coding Protocol).
ManualPage.sec_7_step_3_c: Upload document files or copy-paste long texts into that notebook.
ManualPage.sec_7_step_4: How to command the AI in the IDE chat:
ManualPage.sec_7_step_4_a: Ask the AI, mentioning the notebook name, e.g., "Connect to NotebookLM and fetch data from the 'AI Coding Protocol' notebook."
ManualPage.sec_7_step_4_b: The AI will search and retrieve deep knowledge from that notebook to answer you immediately!
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_1_2: Installs the Protocol into your project.
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_2_2: Checks .env exposure and memory file sizes.
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_3_2: Archives old lessons to prevent bloat.
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_4_2: Creates a fresh STATE.md for a new task.
ManualPage.sec_8_tr_5_2: Summarizes context to transfer to a new chat.
